title: Reusable resources should be initialized at construction time of Lambda functions
description: To avoid performance issues and potential resource leaks, any reusable resources (such as database connections, HTTP clients, or SDK clients) should be initialized once in the constructor of a Lambda function, rather than on every invocation. This ensures efficient resource management and reduces cold start latency.
recommendation: Initialize all reusable resources in the constructor of your Lambda function class. Avoid creating new instances of clients or connections inside the handler method.
impact: Improper resource initialization can lead to increased latency, higher costs, and resource exhaustion.

checks.message: Initialize all reusable resources in the constructor of your Lambda function class. Avoid creating new instances of clients or connections inside the handler method.
